sourceMovie.title: Shin Kamen Rider
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Shin Kamen Rider (2023) stuck because it commits to its action premise without apologizing—viewers remember set pieces and momentum as much as plot. Hideaki Anno's control of tone keeps the ride coherent. The action and drama blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Reign of the Supermen
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Shin Kamen Rider clicked for you, Reign of the Supermen (2019) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and drama, with earned warmth without mush. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: The Amazing Spider-Man 2
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Shin Kamen Rider clicked for you, The Amazing Spider-Man 2 (2014) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and science fiction, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Shin Kamen Rider?
faq.answer: Try Reign of the Supermen, The Amazing Spider-Man 2, Alita: Battle Angel—each shares DNA with Shin Kamen Rider while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Shin Kamen Rider?
faq.answer: Shin Kamen Rider (2023) is best described as Action, Drama, Science Fiction. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Shin Kamen Rider worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 7.0/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this action lane.
